## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs only

## Testing

- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] Ran `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`

## Checklist

- [ ] No raw `yt-dlp` flags added to user-facing CLI
- [ ] Preset-driven behavior maintained
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md`) if needed
